martha.name: Martha
martha.comment: Martha, running conditions look great today, especially between 18:00 and 20:00 when it cools down to around 22°C. The humidity is a bit high, so make sure to hydrate and slap on some sunscreen with that high UV index. If you can tear yourself away from work, it's a perfect evening to lace up and get moving, maybe even drag Britt along for a sunset run.

britt.name: Britt
britt.comment: Britt, decent day for a cycle, especially between 10:00–12:00 when it's a comfortable 15°C with minimal wind. Might be a bit breezy later, but that morning window is looking sweet. Why not drag Martha along and make a morning of it?
